content: Hi I am brand new to this site and trying to navigate it. I am also learning category theory through self study Can someone recommend a good introductory book or two in this area of abstract math.
A message was moved here from #community: general > The Leiden Declaration on AI in mathematics by Nathanael Arkor.

Hello. Can you say a little bit about your background and interests? There are quite a few books on category theory, and whether or not a given book is suitable depends a lot on your mathematical background and what you're hoping to get out of it.
